overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a vibrant autumn forest with red and gold foliage, following a path alongside a river and waterfall before wading through a shallow stream. The scene features cinematic lighting with sunbeams filtering through the trees and showcases detailed natural environments with rocky terrain and mountain vistas.

events.description: ground surface transitions from grassy patches to rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path beside the river, passing wooden fences and small bridges

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence lining the right side of the path
calm water flowing alongside the trail with visible current
dense forest with vibrant red, orange and yellow foliage
tall reddish rock formations visible in the background
wooden footbridge crossing the stream in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a grassy forest trail beside a flowing river. Wooden fences line the path while autumn-colored trees surround the area. The ground transitions from grass to rocky terrain as the character progresses toward a distant wooden bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain path with waterfall overlook

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the towering mountain peak and waterfall

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky path before pausing to look up at the mountain vista and waterfall

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down the red rock cliff face
snow-capped mountain summit visible above the cliffs

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues along the rocky mountain path as a magnificent waterfall comes into view. The wooden fence now lines the left side as the trail curves. The character pauses to look up at the towering mountain peak with snow-capped summit, surrounded by dramatic red rock cliffs.

events.description: scene transitions from rocky waterfall path to shallow forest stream

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow stream surrounded by autumn trees and sunbeams

entered.detail: clear shallow water with visible rocks on the stream bed
boulders scattered along the stream banks
golden light rays filtering through the tree canopy

segments.scene_description: Following a scene transition, Aloy is now wading through a shallow forest stream. The wooden fences and waterfall vista are replaced by a serene waterway surrounded by autumn trees. Golden sunbeams filter through the canopy, illuminating the clear water and scattered boulders along the banks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a vibrant autumn forest that transitions from a riverside trail into a dramatic mountain vista and finally into a serene woodland stream. It begins with Aloy walking along a grassy path lined with wooden fences and red-gold trees, where the ground gradually shifts to rocky terrain as she approaches a distant wooden bridge. As the trail curves, the scene opens up to reveal a magnificent waterfall cascading beside towering red rock cliffs and a distant snow-capped mountain peak. The environment then shifts away from the heights toward a shallow forest waterway, where the open vistas are replaced by a dense canopy of autumn foliage. Finally, the camera captures golden sunbeams filtering through the trees to illuminate the clear water and scattered boulders along the banks.
